  Refactor 0: "Convert to Effect.fn(\"methodReturnsEffect\")" (refactor.rewrite.effect.effectGenToFn)
  Refactor 1: "Toggle return type annotation" (refactor.rewrite.effect.toggleReturnTypeAnnotation)

=== Refactor Application Results ===

=== [R1] Refactor 0: "Convert to Effect.fn(\"methodReturnsEffect\")" ===

--- file:///.src/effectGenToFn_classMethod.ts ---
// refactor: 7:17
// @effect-v3
import * as Eff from "effect/Effect"

class Test {
  methodReturnsEffect = Eff.fn("methodReturnsEffect")(function* (arg1: number, arg2: number) {
    const a = yield* Eff.succeed(arg1);
    const b = yield* Eff.succeed(arg2);
    return a + b;
});
}


=== [R1] Refactor 1: "Toggle return type annotation" ===

--- file:///.src/effectGenToFn_classMethod.ts ---
// refactor: 7:17
// @effect-v3
import * as Eff from "effect/Effect"

class Test {
  methodReturnsEffect(arg1: number, arg2: number): Eff.Effect<number, never, never> {
    return Eff.gen(function*() {
      const a = yield* Eff.succeed(arg1)
      const b = yield* Eff.succeed(arg2)
      return a + b
    })
  }
}
